title: Add RATE_LIMITED error code to protocol.rs
description: Why: stable client-facing contract for rate limit responses. What: add 'pub const RATE_LIMITED: i32 = -32020;' to the rpc_errors module in core/src/protocol.rs. The next available custom code after -32012.
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-core passes; rpc_errors::RATE_LIMITED usable from relay
